name: Seed Starting Calculator: When to Start Seeds Indoors

name: Fall Planting Calculator: Is It Too Late to Plant?
description: Plan fall planting and harvest timing before your first frost.

name: Frost Date Calculator (ZIP / Postal Code)
description: Look up your average last spring frost and first fall frost dates at the 32°F / 0°C freeze threshold; the baseline used for frost-based planting schedules.
keywords: frost date calculator, last frost date, first frost date, ZIP code, postal code

name: Growing Degree Day Garden Calculator: Will Your Crop Mature Before Frost?
description: Estimate whether a crop can reach maturity before your typical first frost using climate normals growing degree days (GDD).
keywords: growing degree day calculator, GDD calculator, crop maturity before frost, short season gardening

name: Cut Flower Stem Yield Calculator for Short Seasons
description: Estimate bouquet stem needs, plants, seed quantities, bed feet, succession waves, and frost-risk gaps for short-season cut flower production.
keywords: cut flower stem yield calculator, flower farm spreadsheet, bouquet production calculator, succession planting flowers, short season cut flowers

name: Dahlia Bloom-Before-Frost Calculator

name: Seed Packet Reality Checker
